rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DALE BOND VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 21, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion is denied. Court sustains objection to plaintiff's testimony. Even if the court assumes that all of the exposure occurred in Washington, the court applies California law regarding punitive damages. It is doubtful that Washington's interest is to limit plaintiff's damages. California's interest to deter the malicious conduct of one of its residents clearly outweighs Washington's interest. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. MARK WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 21, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT FINANCIAL FREEDOM SENIOR FUNDING CORPORATION, Motion For Attorneys Fees and Costs. Motion is denied. There is no privity between plaintiff and defendant and the case was about priority. Controlling authority is Clar vs. Cacciola (1987) 193 Cal.App. 3d 1032. No basis for recovery of fees under Civil Code section 1367. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: IAIN BAKER VS. CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS HOLDING CO., LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 21, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT AECOM ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP, INC DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. First Amended Complaint is vague and uncertain. Plaintiff to plead sufficient facts showing that each element of his causes of action against Aecom are met. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SANDRA WATSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 21, 2009, line 11, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether plaintiff complied with the right to inspect documents. (24 CFR 966.4(m).) Inspection requested July 17, 2009. (Declaration of Sandra Watson.) =(302/CWW)
